title: Harden Windows proof and block premature publication
action: Resolve four P1 release findings: first-run smoke must use production defaults rather than a missing explicit config; CI must download the immutable Herdr Windows preview asset preview-2026-07-17-813fec141faa/herdr-windows-x86_64.exe, verify SHA-256 2b53a21755d6393515f84c246b6297d46103e7e741714bcf2244b408c1178d57 before execution, pass that exact path through HERDR_SMOKE_HERDR_BINARY (or an explicit script parameter), and the smoke must use that exact path for every Herdr invocation rather than ambient PATH; v0.1.1 release must not include/upload a Windows target until proof passes; retain Linux/macOS behavior. Do not push, tag, publish, or claim Windows support.

truths: CI executes only the checksum-verified pinned Herdr preview binary
First-run smoke reaches production default root selection
Release workflow cannot publish a Windows asset
Linux and macOS release packaging remain unchanged

artifacts.substantive: default first-run flow without missing explicit config

key_links: Workflow passes the verified binary to the production smoke
Release matrix has no Windows target until the blocked proof is resolved

verify: git diff --check && ! rg -n "windows-latest|x86_64-pc-windows-msvc" .github/workflows/release.yml && rg -n "runs-on: windows-2022|x86_64-pc-windows-msvc" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "preview-2026-07-17-813fec141faa" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "2b53a21755d6393515f84c246b6297d46103e7e741714bcf2244b408c1178d57" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "HERDR_SMOKE_HERDR_BINARY|Get-FileHash" .github/workflows/ci.yml scripts/windows-runtime-smoke.ps1 && ! rg -n "Invoke-Expression|Invoke-RestMethod.*install.ps1" .github/workflows/ci.yml

trace.outcome: Pinned every Herdr smoke invocation to the checksum-verified preview binary, exercised default first-run config creation, and withheld Windows release assets while preserving Linux/macOS packaging.
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":[".github/workflows/ci.yml Windows proof job",".github/workflows/release.yml publication matrix and packaging","scripts/windows-runtime-smoke.ps1 first-run and Herdr invocation paths"],"tests_added_or_changed":["Cell contract assertions for immutable URL/hash, exact binary handoff, no mutable installer, and no Windows publication"],"red_failure_evidence":"git show HEAD:.github/workflows/ci.yml showed Invoke-RestMethod https://herdr.dev/install.ps1 piped to Invoke-Expression and ambient herdr; git show HEAD:.github/workflows/release.yml showed x86_64-pc-windows-msvc on windows-latest; git show HEAD:scripts/windows-runtime-smoke.ps1 showed first run Start-Gateway $gatewayBinary $configPath before config existed.","verification_run":"Exact cell verify exited 0: git diff --check; no Windows target in release; windows-2022/MSVC remains in CI; immutable preview URL and SHA-256 present; exact binary env handoff and Get-FileHash present; no Invoke-Expression or install.ps1 execution.","deliberate_exceptions":["The Windows runtime itself cannot execute on this Linux worker; this repair withholds Windows publication until the pinned CI proof passes."]}
trace.verify_output: exit 0; release workflow has no Windows target; CI retains windows-2022/MSVC, pins preview-2026-07-17-813fec141faa and SHA-256 2b53a2...8d57; CI exports HERDR_SMOKE_HERDR_BINARY; smoke consumes the exact path; no Invoke-Expression or remote install.ps1 remains
trace.verify_command: git diff --check && ! rg -n "windows-latest|x86_64-pc-windows-msvc" .github/workflows/release.yml && rg -n "runs-on: windows-2022|x86_64-pc-windows-msvc" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "preview-2026-07-17-813fec141faa" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "2b53a21755d6393515f84c246b6297d46103e7e741714bcf2244b408c1178d57" .github/workflows/ci.yml && rg -n "HERDR_SMOKE_HERDR_BINARY|Get-FileHash" .github/workflows/ci.yml scripts/windows-runtime-smoke.ps1 && ! rg -n "Invoke-Expression|Invoke-RestMethod.*install.ps1" .github/workflows/ci.yml
